from.description: Avoid starting sysdiagnose with the built-in macOS shortcut cmd+shift+option+ctrl+/

manipulators.description: Hyper+< sends Ctrl+B then n for tmux next-window

rules.description: Right Ctrl => FN (for Glove80 Apple fn key hack)
FnMate: Fn navigation, scrolling, and mouse clicks
OE: tap = ö, hold = number and navigation layer
AE: tap = ä, hold = programming layer
